body_excerpt: In PMRWritePMPageList of pmr.c, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a logic error in the code. This could lead to local escalation of privilege in the kernel with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
